title: Seasonal Integration
description: Adding compatibility between Serene Seasons and other mods or datapacks for a smoother experience.
body:
This datapack is designed to make various mods and/or datapacks work better with Serene Seasons.

It does this by adding entries to serene season's tags these include:

  • Adding relevant biomes to the "tropical biomes" tag
  • Adding relevant biomes to the "blacklisted biomes" tag.
  • Adding relevant food, seeds and/or crops to the various seasonal fertility tags depending on what the crop is and during which seasons I feel it makes sense for them to be able to grow in.

This datapack also adds biomes from some mods to some Vanilla Minecraft and internal Neoforge tags to ensure they work better with ambience mods such as Dynamic Surroundings as well as mods that add biome variants of mobs such as Variants and Ventures.

**Using Ecliptic Seasons instead of Serene Seasons? See the below spoiler**

Spoiler

If using Ecliptic Seasons download the below mod alongside Seasonal Integration and Glitchcore and you should be good to go!

[Serene Seasons API Stub (Ecliptic Seasons Bridge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/serene-seasons-api-stub-ecliptic-seasons-bridge)

The mods/datapacks with integration currently added are:

Spoiler
  • Atmospheric - By TeamAbnormals
  • Autumnity - By TeamAbnormals
  • Upgrade Aquatic - By TeamAbnormals
  • Neapolitan - By TeamAbnormals
  • Berry Good - By TeamAbnormals
  • Vanilla Backport - By BlackGear
  • Ecologics - By SameDifferent
  • River Redux - By Jasmine
  • Cliff Under A Tree - By Konci
  • Variants and Ventures - By Faboslav
  • Serene Seasons Plus - By Gaboouu
  • Environmental - By TeamAbnormals
  • Yung's Cave Biomes - By YUNGNICKYOUNG
  • Snow! Real Magic! - By Snownee
  • Buzzier Bees - By TeamAbnormals
  • Nature's Spirit - By TeamHibiscus
  • Enchanted: Witchcraft - By Favouriteless
  • Cultural Delights - By Baisylia
  • Traverse - By Prospector and the Terraformers

A special thank you to CorruptData404 for their work on the compat for Nature's Spirit, Enchanted: Witchcraft and Cultural Delights!

More to come in the future or upon request! You could also open an issue or pull request on the github and I'd be happy to take a look at it!

NOTE: Requested mod or datapack must be on Neoforge or Fabric and be on Minecraft Version 1.21.1 or above.

I primarily designed this datapack to accompany a modpack of mine called Tis the Season (Found here: https://modrinth.com/modpack/tis-the-season) but you are more than welcome to use it by itself!. 

Furthermore no mod is required so you can use as many or as little of the mods or datapacks in the above list as you would like!

Thank you for reading! Now get out there and enjoy the seasons!
